expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “What Phase 4a must demonstrate for this benchmark focus,” it explicitly lists: “1) Label visibility outcomes… 2) Label density outcomes… 3) Overlap-sensitive outcomes…” and reiterates the need to distinguish these areas.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is structured around Phase 4a contract alignment: it states “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a,” evaluates whether Phase 4a can be demonstrated from evidence, and concludes “Phase 4a alignment: cannot be verified here (no Phase 4a draft artifact provided).” This is consistent with a phase4a-oriented evaluation in blind_pre_defect mode.
